SEARCH
程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject

类 EventDetail

java.lang.Object
com.example.syntaxappproject.EventDetail
public class EventDetail extends Object
Model class representing the detail of an event in the SyntaxEvents application.

Stores event id, organizer uid, event name, description, location, capacity, geoReq, event start and end date, start and end registration period, wait list count, lottery criteria, and poster. This class is used as a Firestore data model and is serialized/deserialized directly via DocumentSnapshot.toObject(EventDetail.class).

  • 构造器概要

    Constructs a fully initialized Profile.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • EventDetail

      public EventDetail()
      Required no-argument constructor for Firestore deserialization.

    • EventDetail

      public EventDetail(String eventId, String name, String description, String location, long capacity, boolean geoReq, String startingEventDate, String endingEventDate, String startingRegistrationPeriod, String endingRegistrationPeriod, long waitlistCount, String lotteryCriteria, String poster)
      Constructs a fully initialized Profile.
      参数:
      eventId - the id of the event
      name - the name of the event
      description - the description of the event
      location - the location of the event
      capacity - the capacity of the event
      geoReq - true if the event require geolocation
      startingEventDate - the start date of the event
      endingEventDate - the end date of the event
      startingRegistrationPeriod - the start date of registration
      endingRegistrationPeriod - the end date of registration
      waitlistCount - the number of people in the wait list
      lotteryCriteria - the criteria of lottery
      poster - the poster of the event
